best_individual: mul(if_then_else(is_water, protected_div(0.191, protected_div(distance, 0.026)), 0.004), add(steepness, add(step_penalty_adder(0.644, steepness, distance), step_penalty_adder(0.637, distance, 0.026))))

hall_of_fame.individual: mul(if_then_else(is_water, protected_div(0.191, protected_div(distance, 0.026)), 0.004), add(steepness, add(step_penalty_adder(0.644, steepness, distance), step_penalty_adder(0.637, distance, 0.026))))
